objective: Prepare a reviewed technical implementation proposal for the public scaffold.
context: Product stewardship has defined the desired direction; Moss should translate it into bounded technical artifacts and validation evidence.
decisions_made: Keep private deployment state outside the public scaffold.
Use review gates before enabling new runtime authority.
open_constraints: No credentials, host-control mounts, provider state, private topology, or unredacted command output are included in this handoff.
next_action: Moss drafts the technical proposal, runs review gates, records validation commands, and returns stewardship decisions to Denholm.
privacy_constraints: Reference private evidence through opaque private-ref identifiers when needed.
